notes: Kontakt-5 — 2nd generation Soviet ERA (NII Stali). First ERA effective against APFSDS: heavy flyer plates shear long-rod penetrators. ~1.5-1.8x vs KE (APFSDS), ~2.5-3.0x vs HEAT. Used on T-80U, T-72B3. Contains 4S22 explosive elements. Replaced by Relikt on newer platforms. BHN placeholder — ERA does not have Brinell hardness.
